raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing to formally express my concern regarding an unresolved dispute involving an invalid charge on my Citi Bank credit card dated XX/XX/year>. The charge in question was made by XXXX is invalid. The service was never rendered or provided. 

Transaction Date : XX/XX/year> Dispute Date : XX/XX/year> Amount : {$1600.00} Despite reaching out to both Citi Bank and XXXX to address this issue, my concerns remain unresolved, and the disputed amount has not been refunded. This has caused significant inconvenience and frustration. 

I kindly urge Citi Bank and XXXX to investigate this matter promptly and resolve the charge reversal at the earliest possible opportunity. Please provide confirmation once the issue has been addressed. 

Thank you for your immediate attention to this matter.
